summary: Tested Debiteuren page UI and backend API integration. All 12 backend tests passed. UI shows correct tabs, 3D shadow cards matching VerkoopPage styling, and all tab navigation works. Grootboek integration correctly creates journaalposten for invoices (VK dagboek) and payments (BK dagboek).

issues: 403 error on notifications endpoint visible in console - not blocking but should be investigated

frontend_tests.debiteuren_page_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs visible (Overzicht, Verwerken, Openstaande Facturen, Herinneringen Verzenden, Afletteren, Ouderdomsanalyse)
frontend_tests.styling_match_verkoop: PASS - 4 summary cards with 3D shadow styling, emerald green active tab
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: PASS - All tabs clickable and switch correctly

api_tests.POST /api/boekhouding/debiteuren: PASS - Creates new customer with auto-generated nummer
api_tests.POST /api/boekhouding/verkoopfacturen: PASS - Creates new invoice with auto-generated factuurnummer
api_tests.PUT /api/boekhouding/verkoopfacturen/{id: PASS - Status change to verzonden triggers journaalpost
api_tests.POST /api/boekhouding/verkoopfacturen/{i: PASS - Payment creates bank journaalpost and updates status to betaald

critical_code_review_comments: Debiteuren page (DebiteruenPage.js) correctly implements all required tabs matching VerkoopPage styling
TabButton component uses same emerald-600 green styling as VerkoopPage
Summary cards have matching 3D shadow styling with hover effects
Backend boekhouding_legacy.py correctly auto-creates journaalposten on status change and payments
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed debiteuren and facturen during testing (TEST_Unittest Klant BV, TEST_Single Klant, TEST_Factuur Test Klant, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debiteuren functionality is fully working. All CRUD operations, status changes, payment processing (afletteren), and grootboek integration work correctly. The UI matches VerkoopPage styling with 3D shadow cards and emerald green tabs. The notifications endpoint returns 403 which appears to be a separate issue not related to this feature.
